template.name: Brutalist s_framed_intro
template.xpath: Empowering artists to collaborate and innovate, creating impactful works that inspire and resonate with audiences.

attribute.name: class
attribute.remove: g-col-lg-5 g-height-14 col-lg-5 o_cc o_cc2 order-lg-0

xpath.attribute: z-index: 3; grid-area: 5 / 10 / 13 / 13; --grid-item-padding-y: 0px; --grid-item-padding-x: 0px; border-left-color: var(--o-color-2) !important; border-bottom-color: var(--o-color-2) !important; border-right-color: var(--o-color-2) !important; border-top-color: var(--o-color-2) !important; --box-border-left-width: 16px; --box-border-bottom-width: 16px; --box-border-right-width: 16px; --box-border-top-width: 16px; order: 1;
